<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Regenerate API key"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api-keys/{id}/regenerate"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>

</MethodEndpoint>



    Regenerates an API key's `key` and returns the new key.

    ### Permissions
    * `payment-method:write`

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
